action.reasoning: Observation: 5 epochs took ~146 seconds, val_acc=0.63. Training accuracy is ~95% but val is 63%, showing overfitting. The model is learning well. Analysis: Each epoch takes ~29 seconds. With 2.9h remaining and 29 iterations left, I can train for much longer. The val_acc is still improving at epoch 5, so more epochs will help. I should submit eval first to get a baseline score, then train longer. Decision: Submit eval with current checkpoint, then train for 50 epochs with better settings.
